mapper.sql: id, express_id, logistic_code, shipper_code, action_code, accept_time, accept_station, location, track_order, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM express_track WHERE logistic_code = #{logisticCode} AND accept_time = #{acceptTime}
SELECT FROM express_track WHERE express_id = #{expressId} ORDER BY accept_time ASC
SELECT FROM express_track WHERE express_id = #{expressId} ORDER BY accept_time DESC
SELECT FROM express_track WHERE logistic_code = #{logisticCode} ORDER BY accept_time ASC
SELECT FROM express_track WHERE logistic_code = #{logisticCode} ORDER BY accept_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM express_track WHERE location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM express_track WHERE express_id = #{expressId}
